title: tests: quay.io/coreos/11bot is only available for amd64
body:
This prevents us from running the integration tests on other architectures.

https://openqa-assets.opensuse.org/tests/5768459/file/skopeo-integration.txt

```
Failed
=== RUN   TestProxy/TestProxyMetadata
    proxy_test.go:490: 
        	Error Trace:	/var/tmp/skopeo/integration/proxy_test.go:490
        	Error:      	Received unexpected error:
        	            	Testing image docker://quay.io/coreos/11bot: remote error: no image found in image index for architecture "arm64", variant "v8", OS "linux"
        	Test:       	TestProxy/TestProxyMetadata
--- FAIL: TestProxy/TestProxyMetadata (3.91s)
```
